smoke.name: smoke
smoke.description: Fast health checks — target < 60s. Minimal import + smoke tests.

unit.name: unit
unit.description: Pure unit tests — no I/O, no network, no runtime writes. Contract/validator tests.

integration.name: integration
integration.description: Integration-level tests — CLI helpers, projections, query combinations. May write tmp.

slow.name: slow
slow.description: Long-running tests — real diagnostics, full scan, large sample generation, all-diagnostics aggregate.

full.name: full
full.description: Full regression suite — all tests across foundation, audit, nightly, rtcm, prompt, tool_runtime, mode, gateway, asset, memory, m11.
full.entrypoint: python -m pytest backend/app/foundation backend/app/audit backend/app/nightly backend/app/rtcm backend/app/prompt backend/app/tool_runtime backend/app/mode backend/app/gateway backend/app/asset backend/app/memory backend/app/m11 -v

marker_definitions.unit: pure unit tests — no I/O, no network, no runtime
marker_definitions.integration: integration-level tests — CLI helpers, projections, queries
marker_definitions.slow: long-running tests — real diagnostics, full scan, large samples
marker_definitions.no_network: must not call network or webhooks
marker_definitions.no_runtime_write: must not write runtime state or action queue
marker_definitions.no_secret: must not read or output secrets, tokens, webhook URLs

candidates.reason: runs full diagnostic aggregate with real file scans
runs trend projection with audit JSONL scan
runs audit trend with artifact bundle generation
writes trend report artifact to disk
generates 5 CLI scenario samples to disk
builds multi-artifact bundle with real projections
scans all JSONL files in audit trail
runs audit query with multi-file scan
loads all JSONL records across audit trail
runs Feishu preview with projection building
runs full trend projection with guard checks
generates large sample with query simulation
runs nightly trend report dry-run with projections

unit_fast.description: Fast unit tests — no I/O, no slow

integration_fast.description: Fast integration tests — CLI helpers, no slow

foundation_fast.description: Foundation tests excluding slow — most stable

full_regression.command: python -m pytest backend/app/foundation backend/app/audit backend/app/nightly backend/app/rtcm backend/app/prompt backend/app/tool_runtime backend/app/mode backend/app/gateway backend/app/asset backend/app/memory backend/app/m11 -v

slow_only.description: Slow tests only — full diagnostics, scan, samples

safety_checks.command: python -m pytest -m 'no_network and no_runtime_write and no_secret' -v
safety_checks.description: Safety constraint tests — no network, no runtime write, no secret

risks.current_status: Known — tests are correct but slow
risks.recommended_next_action: Mark slow candidates with @pytest.mark.slow; split into separate pipeline stage

risks.risk_name: queue-sandbox diagnostic may report missing queue_path warnings
risks.current_status: Design-only concern — queue is optional in new architecture
risks.recommended_next_action: Monitor in next sprint; not blocking

risks.risk_name: Foundation surfaces may contain unknown taxonomy entries

risks.evidence: design-only fallback used; real file not yet written
risks.current_status: Expected for new codebase — design-only fallback handles this
risks.recommended_next_action: Normal in new projects; file gets created as audit runs

risks.evidence: design-only fallback used; real file not yet written
risks.current_status: Same as tool_runtime — expected for new codebase
risks.recommended_next_action: Same as tool_runtime — expected; not blocking

risks.risk_name: Feishu manual send still blocked by R241-13D policy
risks.evidence: R241-13D blocks manual send; requires Gateway integration to unblock
risks.current_status: By design — manual send blocked until Gateway sidecar complete
risks.recommended_next_action: R241-16/17: implement Gateway Feishu sidecar, then re-enable

risks.risk_name: Gateway sidecar / API not implemented for Feishu send
risks.evidence: Gateway has no Feishu channel integration; app/channels/feishu.py exists but not wired
risks.current_status: Known gap — Feishu integration exists in app/channels but not gateway-wired
risks.recommended_next_action: R241-16/17: wire Feishu channel through Gateway router

risks.risk_name: Mode Router not integrated with lead_agent
risks.evidence: Mode router exists in harness but not connected to agent lifecycle
risks.current_status: Mode router is scaffolded but not activated
risks.recommended_next_action: R241-18: integrate ModeRouter into agent factory

risks.evidence: append-only writer exists but no retention policy
risks.current_status: Design gap — not critical for current volume
risks.recommended_next_action: R241-20: add retention policy to audit_trail_writer

markers.unit: pure unit tests — no I/O, no network, no runtime
markers.integration: integration-level tests — CLI helpers, projections, queries
markers.slow: long-running tests — real diagnostics, full scan, large samples
markers.no_network: must not call network or webhooks
markers.no_runtime_write: must not write runtime state or action queue
markers.no_secret: must not read or output secrets, tokens, webhook URLs
